about.label: About
about.title: A Focused AI Chibi Maker
about.para1: AI Chibi Generator is built around one simple creative loop: describe or upload a reference, choose a chibi style, generate, and download. The product is intentionally lightweight so people can make cute avatars, stickers, couple art, pet chibi images, and character concepts without learning a complex design tool.
about.para2: The service uses a dedicated image generation backend when configured, while local development can fall back to mock previews. That keeps the app testable for development and reliable for production operations.
about.value1_desc: The interface stays close to the creative action and avoids unnecessary workflow steps.
about.value2_desc: Prompts and presets are tuned for expressive chibi proportions, soft details, and avatar-ready results.
about.value3_desc: Downloads, account history, quotas, and SEO tool pages are designed around real usage.
